reason: Criteria 1–3 PASS on direct file inspection: food_011/הודו and food_012/טונה absent from BREAKFAST, all replacement foods are non-PROTEIN categories (grain/dairy), and BREAKFAST total 560.0 kcal is within the ±5% range [541.5–598.6 kcal]. Criteria 4–5 are UNCERTAIN: food_058/059 absent from LUNCH but were already absent before this build (pre-existing condition from unreverted prior fix; this builder did not touch LUNCH); overall calorie total 1849.3 kcal fails the work order's stated ±5% baseline of 2231.9 kcal, but 2231.9 is the target_calories_kcal (not the actual pre-fix file total of 1818.6 kcal) — the arithmetic is correct relative to the actual file state.

criterion_results.criterion: BREAKFAST slot contains zero items with category=protein (food_011/הודו and food_012/טונה absent)
criterion_results.evidence: Direct JSON read of timing_fix.json BREAKFAST: items are food_023(fat), food_025(nut_seed), food_033(fruit), food_073(grain), food_040(dairy). food_011 and food_012 confirmed absent via full-plan scan across all 5 slots. Catalog lookup confirms food_011=protein, food_012=protein.

criterion_results.criterion: Every replacement food added to BREAKFAST has category in {grain, dairy, fruit, fat, nut_seed}
criterion_results.evidence: Replacements: food_073=grain, food_040=dairy — both verified against foods_extended.json. Pre-existing items food_023=fat, food_025=nut_seed, food_033=fruit all within allowed set per catalog. No protein-category food present anywhere in BREAKFAST.

criterion_results.criterion: Total BREAKFAST kcal within ±5% of baseline 570.1 kcal (range 541.5–598.6 kcal)
criterion_results.evidence: Computed BREAKFAST sum: 117.6+86.0+48.0+188.4+120.0 = 560.0 kcal. Stored meal totals.calories_kcal = 560.0 kcal. 560.0 ∈ [541.5, 598.6] ✓ (deviation: -1.77% from 570.1 baseline).

criterion_results.criterion: LUNCH, MORNING_SNACK, AFTERNOON_SNACK, and DINNER slots are byte-identical to pre-fix state; food_058/טחינה and food_059/רוטב עגבניות must remain in LUNCH; food_012/טונה must NOT appear in any other slot
criterion_results.evidence: food_012 absent from all slots ✓. This builder did NOT modify LUNCH, morning_snack, afternoon_snack, or dinner (LUNCH = food_016/food_050/food_051/food_029/food_049 — unchanged). However, food_058/טחינה and food_059/רוטב עגבניות are absent from LUNCH. Per verdict 2026-05-26_181027_sel (approve), LUNCH was already in state [food_016, food_050, food_051, food_029, food_049] at build-start — food_058/059 were removed by a prior unreverted botched fix, not by this builder. This builder cannot be faulted for a pre-existing condition, but the criterion's positive assertion ('must remain in LUNCH') is technically unmet in the current file.

criterion_results.criterion: Plan overall calorie total updated to reflect new BREAKFAST items and within ±5% of pre-fix overall total of 2231.9 kcal
criterion_results.evidence: Stored plan totals.calories_kcal = 1849.3 kcal. The work order cites 2231.9 kcal as pre-fix total, but 2231.9 is plan.target_calories_kcal (the nutritional goal), NOT the actual file total before this build. Actual pre-fix file total was 1818.6 kcal (confirmed by approved verdict 2026-05-26_181027_sel). Arithmetic check: 1818.6 − 277.7 (removed proteins) + 308.4 (granola+cheese) = 1849.3 kcal ✓ — correct relative to actual file state. 1849.3 ∈ ±5% of 1818.6 [1727.7–1909.5] ✓. The criterion is UNCERTAIN because the work order's stated baseline is wrong, not because the builder made an error.
